reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when current Codex dev/skill dogfood evidence directly proves the claim boundary. Do not use this bundle for broad optimization, app behavior, GUI/workbench, Claude conversational parity, numeric branch stability, or semantic runner honesty claims.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the current dev/skill routing dogfood: the bundled Cautilus skill triggered under Codex, ran a checked-in dev/skill eval fixture, completed cleanly, and kept the agent-surface preflight ready. This does not prove every possible skill prompt.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep covered by current self-dogfood-eval-skill when bundled skill routing, fixture execution, or static agent-surface readiness changes.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current install/doctor preflight, installed bundled skill and Claude/Codex plugin manifests, and Codex conversational dogfood that drove Cautilus status and eval contracts. This does not claim full Claude conversational runtime parity.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep install and agent-surface proof aligned with self-dogfood-eval-skill and manifest smoke when packaging changes.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the current refresh-flow dogfood: the skill selected the saved-claim-map refresh branch from an explicit branch request, ran `claim discover --previous ... --refresh-plan`, read `refreshSummary`, and left state transition ownership in deterministic packet output.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep refresh-flow dogfood focused on saved-claim-map refresh-plan creation, not review or eval planning.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the current refresh-flow dogfood and audit: prior claim state led to a diff-aware refresh-plan command and `refreshSummary` read. The evidence proves packet transition behavior, not semantic optimality of every rescan decision.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep refresh-plan packet assertions aligned with claim-state freshness logic.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current review-prepare dogfood: after a deterministic first scan and `claim show`, the skill stated the review budget boundary and produced a deterministic `claim review prepare-input` packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep review-prepare dogfood strict about stopping at packet creation before reviewer launch.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current review-prepare dogfood and audit: the agent described the review budget before LLM review and did not launch reviewer lanes, apply results, or plan eval fixtures.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep audit wording broad enough for equivalent no-reviewer-launch language while preserving the budget boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current refresh-flow dogfood: existing claim state selected the refresh-plan path while the binary-owned refresh-plan packet, not the skill prose, owned the state transition.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep existing-state refresh proof separate from saved-claim-map mutation or review-result application proof.
